claim: Obsidian Media DB plugin queries multiple APIs (TMDB, OMDb, Open Library, Jikan, Steam, MusicBrainz, etc.) for movies, series, anime, manga, books, comics, games, music and wiki articles into Obsidian.
quote: A plugin that can query multiple APIs for movies, series, anime, games, music and wiki articles, and import them into your vault.

claim: Obsidian Book Search plugin uses Google Books API to auto-create book notes with full metadata; integrates with Templater.
quote: Obsidian plugin that automatically creates notes by searching for books

claim: Book Search inserts a note in your vault with metadata pre-populated from Google Books and is compatible with Templater.
quote: automatically creates notes by searching for books

claim: SIMKL offers unlimited free watchlist tracking with browser-based auto-scrobbling for Netflix/Hulu/Crunchyroll/Plex/Kodi/Jellyfin; Trakt's free tier was capped at 100 watchlist+collection items in 2026.
quote: Until CPU dies (unlimited) ... Trakt: 100 items combined

claim: Simkl is the most comprehensive all-purpose Trakt replacement with automatic logging across TV/movies/anime; Letterboxd remains the leading film community; Serializd is the Letterboxd-for-TV.
quote: Simkl emerges as the most comprehensive all-purpose replacement

claim: CrossWatch is a self-hosted sync engine that keeps Plex/Jellyfin/Emby in sync with SIMKL/Trakt/AniList/MDBList/Tautulli; runs locally with web UI.
quote: synchronization engine that keeps your Plex, Jellyfin, Emby, SIMKL, Trakt, AniList, TMDb, MDBList and Tautulli in sync

claim: CrossWatch v0.9.18 (Apr 2026) replaces legacy webhooks with the Watcher feature; Docker deploy via ghcr.io/cenodude/crosswatch.
quote: Watcher replaces webhooks and is the only recommended path going forward

claim: Letterboxd Diary RSS Sync plugin uses Letterboxd's public RSS to fetch the last 50 diary entries into a single Letterboxd Diary.md note in Obsidian.
quote: As Letterboxd's API is restrictive, this uses the public RSS feeds to get the data ... only can pull the last 50 movies at a time

claim: Hardcover exposes a free GraphQL API at api.hardcover.app/v1/graphql; tokens issued from account settings; intended for backend use, not browsers.
quote: Hardcover has a GraphQL API that is free-to-use and lets you query on your book reviews and book data

claim: Hardcover's GraphQL API is positioned as a Goodreads API alternative; can update reading status and lists programmatically.
quote: A great Goodreads API alternative

claim: StoryGraph has no public API as of 2026; the team is solo-developer and the API is not prioritised.
quote: no ETA for an official StoryGraph API ... a solo developer and the API is not a priority

claim: StoryGraph supports CSV/Excel export from Manage Account → Manage Your Data → Export StoryGraph Library.
quote: you can export your data to a CSV/Excel file. Head to the 'Manage Account' page

claim: Unofficial Python package storygraph-api scrapes the StoryGraph site to expose data programmatically.
quote: interact with and fetch data from the StoryGraph website

claim: Hardcover focuses on community + clean design; StoryGraph leads on data-driven mood-based recommendations and detailed reading stats.
quote: StoryGraph gives data-driven recommendations and detailed reading stats, while Hardcover builds a social community

claim: Official Readwise → Obsidian plugin auto-exports highlights from Kindle, Apple Books, Google Play Books, Instapaper, Pocket, Medium, Twitter, PDFs into vault notes.
quote: easily and automatically export all your digital highlights from sources such as Amazon Kindle, Apple Books, Google Play Books

claim: Official Readwise plugin for Obsidian; can sync on-open or on a 1/12/24-hour schedule.
quote: Official Readwise plugin for Obsidian

claim: Readwise Full plan is $9.99/mo billed annually ($12.99 monthly); includes Obsidian export, Reader, and the highlight stack; 30-day trial, no free tier.
quote: $9.99/month billed annually ($119.88/year) or $12.99 billed monthly

claim: Media DB plugin's free APIs include Open Library, Jikan, MusicBrainz, Steam, Wikipedia, VNDB; OMDb/TMDB/Comic Vine require free keys; Moby Games key is paid as of Sep 2024.
quote: Open Library - rate-limited at 100/IP per 5 minutes ... Moby Games - API key is no longer free as of September 2024

claim: Obsidian-TV-Tracker is a community plugin that pulls TMDB metadata into a grid View, storing each title as a YAML markdown file.
quote: Movie and Tv show tracker plugin for Obsidian

claim: QuickAdd plugin chains user scripts (e.g. BookFinder.js) into multi-step macros that run from a single hotkey.
quote: QuickAdd for Obsidian

claim: QuickAdd documentation ships a Book Finder macro example: user script + macro choice for one-keystroke book lookup.
quote: putting a user script into a new macro and creating a Macro choice

claim: Obsidian Calibre plugin lets you browse a Calibre Content Server library and read books inside Obsidian; last pushed 2023.
quote: Allow you to access your calibre libraries and read books directly in Obsidian

claim: Trakt's Plex webhook (a VIP/paid feature) auto-scrobbles plays, ratings and library adds from Plex Pass servers.
quote: Plex Webhook uses Plex Pass webhooks to automatically scrobble

claim: Simkl's free Jellyfin add-on pings the Simkl API once a configured watch-percentage is hit (e.g. 70%).
quote: Once you watch a set percentage of the video (For example 70%) on Jellyfin, Simkl Add-on will send a ping

claim: wako is the only mobile app that supports both Trakt and SIMKL backends; SeriesGuide is Android-only with Trakt-only sync.
quote: the only app that lets you choose between the two biggest tracking platforms

claim: Hardcover and StoryGraph are the dominant Goodreads alternatives in 2026; Goodreads is widely viewed as stagnant.
quote: Comprehensive Comparison of Reading Apps & Alternatives

claim: Dataview + Templater + QuickAdd remain the canonical 2026 Obsidian automation trio for building dashboards over media notes.
quote: The Best Obsidian Plugins for 2026

claim: Reference vault template that pre-wires Movie Search + Templater + QuickAdd into a working media tracker.
quote: An automated Obsidian vault for tracking movies, TV shows, and video games

claim: trex (Plex→Trakt scrobbler) is unmaintained — last push January 2019 — leaving Trakt-VIP webhooks or CrossWatch as the active Plex paths.
quote: Plex webhook handler to scrobble on trakt.tv

claim: Serializd is positioned as 'Letterboxd for TV'; TV Time leans on social/community; cross-media trackers like Achriom group films, books, games together.
quote: Best TV Show Tracking Apps 2026: Trakt, TV Time, Serializd
